name: SePrivée
tagline: Website for a private dining and curated events studio
description: A bilingual website for SePrivée, a private dining and curated events studio based in Montevideo and Maldonado, Uruguay. Features service showcases for private dining, sushi experiences, cooking classes, and curated events, along with sample menus and a contact form with email notifications via Resend.
highlights: Service showcases for private dining, sushi, cooking classes, and events
Contact form with email notifications via Resend
